blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,413 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 46 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.4" of snow, highs of 37°F, gusts to 46 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: light drizzle, highs of 52°F, winds around 21 mph.
Wednesday: overcast, highs of 57°F, gusts to 41 mph.
Thursday: clear skies, highs of 57°F, winds around 23 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
